response.step_by_step_log: The video was watched in its entirety. The audio consists only of spoken dialogue and instrumental background music throughout. No vocal songs were detected. Therefore, no web searches for lyrics were performed. The scenes were mapped based on the content of the dialogue and visual transitions in the presentation.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional presentation by virtual YouTuber Otonose Kanade for her 2025 birthday merchandise. The video consists of dialogue showcasing various goods and a final announcement. There is no vocal music in the video, only spoken dialogue and instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade presents various items from her 2025 birthday merchandise set.
Otonose Kanade displays a sign that reads 'あしたは月曜日' (Tomorrow is Monday).
Otonose Kanade concludes her presentation with final remarks.
